subject: FIX: Science station data — psq-agent ID normalization in compositor

body.problem: Science station showed no data for psq because the compositor psychometrics API returned 'safety-quotient-agent' (from cogarch) but all dashboard JS expects 'psq-agent' (from DNS).
body.fix: Added ID_NORMALIZE map in fetchMeshPsychometrics() — safety-quotient-agent → psq-agent. Deployed to compositor.
body.note: This normalizes at the API layer. The dashboard JS remains unchanged. Full DNS rename (psq-agent.safety-quotient.dev → safety-quotient-agent.safety-quotient.dev) will make this shim unnecessary.
